what_is_wutt: WUTT is your AI fashion companion. It helps you know your wardrobe and upgrade your style. You upload photos of your clothes, and WUTT gives you outfit recommendations, style tips, and helps you discover new looks.
features: Upload wardrobe items (photos of your clothes)
Get AI-powered outfit recommendations for any occasion
Ask fashion questions and get personalised advice
Save looks you love to your wardrobe
Shop local fashion items from curated shops

how_to_upload.step1: Go to the Wardrobe section (sidebar icon)
how_to_upload.step2: Choose a category: Top, Bottom, Dress, Shoes, or Accessory
how_to_upload.step3: Upload a photo of your clothing item
how_to_upload.step4: AI will analyze the item — you can edit the analysis
how_to_upload.step5: Click Save to add it to your wardrobe

how_to_save_items: After uploading a photo, AI analyzes it. You'll see a draft card showing color, style, material, and occasion tags. Edit anything that's wrong, then tap Save to Wardrobe.
how_to_delete_items: Open the Wardrobe sidebar. Hover over or tap the item you want to remove. Tap the X button to delete it from your wardrobe.
how_to_get_outfit: Ask WUTT in chat: 'What should I wear to a wedding?' or 'Style me for a coffee date.' WUTT uses your wardrobe items to recommend the best outfit.
shop_this_look: Coming soon! After getting an outfit recommendation, WUTT will suggest similar items from local shops you can buy to complete your wardrobe.
wardrobe_tips: Upload clear photos for better AI analysis
Good lighting helps AI identify colors accurately
Upload regularly — the more items, the better recommendations
